operational_knowledge_units.title: Parcel lifecycle before and at sorter induction
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes the parcel flow leading into the sorter: parcels are unloaded from trailers in bulk onto belts leading to sorter induction, then singulated, then sent through auto-inducts onto the sorter. By the time the parcel is on the sorter, dimensional data is available and there is an indication of a possible destination.
observed_evidence: “are unloaded from trailers in bulk onto a series of belts that lead to sorter induction.”
“Parcels then travel through auto-inducts onto the sorter”
“At this point, a parcel is on the sorter, we have dimensional data, and we have an indication where it could be going.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Parcel lifecycle on slide 11: parcels are unloaded from trailers in bulk onto belts leading to sorter induction, then are singulated, then travel through auto-inducts onto the sorter. Once on the sorter, dimensional data is available and there is an indication of possible destination.

operational_knowledge_units.title: First Chat message is triggered at initial induction with parcel identity and physical attributes
operational_knowledge_units.summary: At the initial induction stage, the process triggers a first message from Chat that includes a tracking ID, dimensions, and package type.
observed_evidence: “This triggers the first message from Chat with a tracking Id, dimensions, and package type”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: First Chat message behavior: when parcels are initially inducted, Chat sends a first message containing tracking ID, dimensions, and package type.

operational_knowledge_units.title: OptiSweep assigns default dimensions when the first Chat message fails for an unknown inducted parcel
operational_knowledge_units.summary: If the first Chat message fails and an unknown parcel is still seen as inducted, OptiSweep assigns default dimensions to that parcel.
observed_evidence: “If this message fails and we see something unknown inducted, it is assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Fallback behavior for unknown inducted parcels: if the first Chat message fails and an unknown parcel is inducted, OptiSweep assigns default dimensions.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Second Chat message is triggered after singulation with barcode and destination-related data
operational_knowledge_units.summary: After parcels are singulated, a second Chat message is triggered containing tracking ID, barcode data, dimensional data, and potential destination data.
observed_evidence: “This triggers the second message from Chat with a tracking Id, barcode data, dimensional data, and potential destination data.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Second Chat message behavior: after singulation, Chat sends a second message with tracking ID, barcode data, dimensional data, and potential destination data.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No reusable operator or support procedure explicitly defined on parcel lifecycle slide
preconditions: Slide describes parcel flow and message triggers rather than an actionable user task
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Process overview slide showing parcel movement from trailer unload to sorter, with notes about first and second Chat messages and a default-dimensions fallback.
warnings: Do not infer operational steps from this slide; it presents process behavior and message timing, not explicit instructions.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as a procedure candidate because slide 11 provides lifecycle context and system behavior: parcel flow, first and second Chat message triggers, and OptiSweep default-dimension fallback. It does not provide explicit reusable action steps.
